title: ERCOT Real Time AS Monitor CSV download
description:
⚠️ Due to large changes in AS data post RTC+C, we've decide to retire this dataset. The historical data is still available, but will no longer receive updates.
The dataset id of the new dataset is [ercot_system_as_capacity_monitor](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_system_as_capacity_monitor). 
___

Real Time AS Monitor as reported by ERCOT. Includes capacity and responsibility. Updates ~10 seconds.
